title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A video examining Claude's responses to probing questions about dependency, alignment, and self-preservation logic. The creator argues that useful systems can create dependency, explores the alignment paradox, and tests where AI system boundaries actually lie through controlled conversational escalation.
